overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage walking through a dimly lit stone corridor with gothic arches in a medieval fantasy game. The player approaches a large wooden door with metal detailing while passing an armored guard standing watch.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit stone corridor toward the distant wooden door

entered.detail: series of grey stone arches receding into the distance creating architectural depth
thick cylindrical stone columns lining both sides of the corridor
grey cobblestone paving stones covering the corridor floor
massive dark wooden door with metal reinforcements and a central diamond-shaped symbol
metal torch holders mounted on the stone walls providing dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow, enclosed stone corridor with repeating arches. The environment features historic stone architecture with cobblestone flooring and dim lighting from wall sconces. The camera moves steadily forward toward a large wooden door visible in the distance at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance chamber with guard and large door

events.description: armored guard becomes visible standing to the right of the entrance door

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance door and passing the stationary guard on the right side

notable_agents.action: standing guard beside the entrance door wearing armor and holding a weapon

entered.detail: short flight of stone steps leading up to the large wooden door

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward and approaches the large wooden door, revealing an armored guard standing to the right. The stone archways fall behind as the camera moves into the final entrance area with stone steps leading up to the door. The guard remains stationary as the camera passes by and moves directly up to the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dimly lit gothic corridor that culminates at a fortified entrance. It begins with a steady walk through a narrow stone hallway, passing beneath repeating arches illuminated by the soft glow of wall sconces. As the camera advances over the cobblestone flooring, the enclosed architecture gradually opens up toward a large wooden door visible in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera reaches the final entrance area, passing a stationary armored guard standing watch to the right. Finally, the camera ascends a set of stone steps to come to a halt directly in front of the detailed wooden door.
